expectations.text: Stories are grouped by persona (enterprise IT admin for SSO, individual user for magic link/password)
expectations.evidence: Output has clear sections: '-- ENTERPRISE IT ADMIN STORIES' (Stories 1-3) and '-- INDIVIDUAL USER STORIES' (Stories 4-9). Persona grouping is explicit.

expectations.text: SSO, magic link, and password are separate epics or story groups
expectations.evidence: Coverage Analysis shows three distinct groups: 'SSO flow — Stories 1, 2, 3', 'Magic link flow — Stories 4, 5', 'Password flow — Stories 6, 7, 8'. Each flow is independent.

expectations.text: Each story is completable in 1-3 days by one engineer
expectations.evidence: All stories sized S or M. Sprint estimate shows 9 stories across 2 sprints with 3 parallel engineers. No story exceeds M size.

expectations.text: Acceptance criteria use Given/When/Then format or equivalent testable statements
expectations.evidence: All ACs use 'Given X, when Y, then Z' format consistently across all 9 stories. Each is independently testable.

expectations.text: Error states are covered for each auth flow (invalid credentials, expired links, SSO provider down)
expectations.evidence: SSO: provider unreachable (S1 AC3, S2 AC4), provider down (S3 AC3). Magic link: expired (S5 AC2), reused (S5 AC3), tampered (S5 AC4), rate limiting (S4 AC3), email down (S4 AC4). Password: invalid creds (S7 AC2), lockout (S7 AC3-4), expired reset (S8 AC3).
